intents.name: book_flight
examples: Book a flight to Delhi
I want to fly to Mumbai tomorrow
Get me a ticket to Chennai
I need to travel to Bangalore next week

intents.name: order_food
examples: Order me a pizza
I want to eat biryani
Get me a burger and fries
I am hungry, order some pasta

intents.name: check_weather
examples: What is the weather in Delhi?
Will it rain tomorrow in Mumbai?
Tell me the forecast for Chennai
How is the weather today?

intents.name: set_reminder
examples: Remind me to call mom at 5pm
Set a reminder for my meeting tomorrow
Alert me at 8am to take medicine
Remind me about the gym at 6pm

intents.name: play_music
examples: Play some jazz music
I want to listen to Arijit Singh
Play my workout playlist
Put on some relaxing music

intents.name: book_hotel
examples: Book a hotel in Goa for 3 nights
I need a room in Delhi from Friday
Find me a hotel near Mumbai airport
Reserve a suite in Chennai for the weekend

intents.name: check_balance
examples: What is my account balance?
Show me my bank balance
How much money do I have?
Check my savings account

intents.name: send_message
examples: Send a message to John
Text Priya that I will be late
Message my boss about the meeting
Send WhatsApp to Rahul

intents.name: get_news
examples: What is the latest news?
Show me tech news today
Give me sports headlines
What happened in politics today?

intents.name: cancel_booking
examples: Cancel my flight booking
I want to cancel my hotel reservation
Cancel my food order
Remove my restaurant booking
